arts.ttl: EFL Championship Results Round-up: West Brom beaten, Sunderland slip up
arts.sum: West Bromwich Albion remain top of the EFL Championship table despite losing their first game of the campaign away to Sheffield Wednesday. A Darnell Furlong own goal and fantastic looping header from Josh Windass put the hosts in charge but goals from Josh Maja and Alex Mowatt drew the Baggies level with six minutes to […] The post EFL Championship Results Round-up: West Brom beaten, Sunderland slip up first appeared on The Football Faithful.
